name: Partially my fault for ignoring safety in Millcreek, get comp?

mainEntity.name: Partially my fault for ignoring safety in Millcreek, get comp?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, no-fault system covers even if partially at fault.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, workers' comp is no-fault; covers regardless of your contribution unless intoxication.[1] Focus on work nexus.[2] Key factors: (1) No negligence bar like third-party; (2) Report fully; (3) Insurer may probe; (4) Honesty key.[1] Admit facts but emphasize injury. Benefits not reduced by fault.
